Bernardo Bellotto

by Bernardo Bellotto

View of Dresden
by Bernardo Bellotto
Italy, 18th century · 1748 · etching
Exterior View of the Italian Gate of the Ramparts of the Town of Dresden
by Bernardo Bellotto
Italy · 1750 · Etching on ivory laid paper
View of Pirna with the Fortress of Sonnenstein
by Bernardo Bellotto
Italy · 18th Century · 1755–1765 · Oil on canvas

by Bernardo Bellotto
